===================
===================
=== bobdylan022302.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
23 February 2002 
Centurytel Center
Bossier City, Louisiana
very good audience recording
-----------------------
lineage: trade disks > eac > flac > upload
info: from still on the road, edited to fit these cds
comments: another great show and very nice recording. we were there! Recile had recently joined the band and they were gonna play the Grammy awards in a few days. i remember thinking how rough Cry a While was and i hoped they didn't try that at the Grammys... guess what!
enjoy!
---------------------

disk1
1.Duncan And Brady (trad.)
2.Mr. Tambourine Man
3.It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding)
4.Searching For A Soldier's Grave (Johnnie Wright, Jim Anglin, Jack Anglin)
5.Maggie's Farm
6.Positively 4th Street
7.Cry A While
8.High Water (for Charlie Patton)
9.A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall
10.One Too Many Mornings
11.Tangled Up In Blue
disk 2
1.Summer Days
2.Sugar Baby
3.Drifter's Escape
4.Rainy Day Women # 12 & 35

5.Like A Rolling Stone
6.Honest With Me
7.Blowin' In The Wind
8.All Along The Watchtower 
------------------------------
Concert # 1400 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 17 of the 2002 US Winter Tour. 2002 concert # 17. 

Concert # 17 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

14, 911, 18 acoustic with the band.

2, 4, 10, 14, 18 Bob Dylan (harmonica).

3 Larry Campbell (cittern).

1, 4, 18 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

5 new songs (26%) compared to previous concert. No new songs for this tour.

Stereo audience recording, 125 minutes.

Session info updated 3 December 2003.
